titles.title: Footsteps of the Son of Man

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: The way ahead seemed narrow, I felt the urge to just stay; But He said that, "I'll be with you, even in you day by day," So I'll follow in His footprints all the way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's leading me, I have a faithful friend, I know that He will take me to the end; Sometimes I can't see clearly, My feet they might grow weary; But I'll follow the predestinated plan, In the footsteps (in the footsteps) Of the Son of Man.

verse.name: v4
